TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_kakorot, title = O_kakorot, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_kakorot} }

S.FORM: o kakorot O cecay a pinalengaw no Taywan ko 'anengeray, langdaway ko cengel nira, cowa pirawod ko fao to tireng nira. Misaadihay ko tamdaw a Paloma to 'anengeray, malo hasapaliwal I kakomaenen a dating. O heci halo teloc no ato papah ko nikaenan no 'Amis. Nga'ayay samanta han ko 'anengeray a komaen, nga'ayay a tangtangen nga, kaenen. Ano samangta han komaen i, kietecay ko laloma' no tireng, nga'ayay a mipalowan to faedet no tireng, misakahemaw to faloco' ato pa'icel to pinengneng no mata; maecakay a 'anengeray i, dihekoay ko laloma' no tireng, minga'ayay to kietecay ko tireng, panga'ayay to 'ilang, minga'ayay to ŤĄĺ, ato fowa'. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: o~u kako~uro~ut o~u ¶…ô ¶aj a pina…ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u tajwan ko~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj, …ĺaŇč…¨~…ģawaj ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ nira, ¶o~uwa pirawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u fao~u to~u tir…ôŇč nira. misaa…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a pa…ĺo~uma to~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj, ma…ĺo~u ńßasapa…ĺiwa…ĺ i kako~uma…ôn…ôn a …¨~…ģatiŇč. o~u ńß…ô ¶i ńßa…ĺo~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u ato~u papańß ko~u nika…ônan no~u °amis. Ňča °ajaj samanta ńßan ko~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj a ko~uma…ôn, Ňča °ajaj a taŇčtaŇč…ôn Ňča, ka…ôn…ôn. ano~u samaŇčta ńßan ko~uma…ôn i, ki…ôt…ô ¶aj ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u tir…ôŇč, Ňča °ajaj a mipa…ĺo~uwan to~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u tir…ôŇč, misakańß…ômaw to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u mata; ma…ô ¶akaj a °an…ôŇč…ôraj i, …¨~…ģińß…ôko~uaj ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u tir…ôŇč, miŇča °ajaj to~u ki…ôt…ô ¶aj ko~u tir…ôŇč, paŇča °ajaj to~u °i…ĺaŇč, miŇča °ajaj to~u *, ato~u fo~uwa °. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
S.FORM: o kakorot O cecay a pinalengaw no Taywan ko 'anengeray, langdaway ko cengel nira, cowa pirawod ko fao to tireng nira. Misaadihay ko tamdaw a Paloma to 'anengeray, malo hasapaliwal I kakomaenen a dating. O heci halo teloc no ato papah ko nikaenan no 'Amis. Nga'ayay samanta han ko 'anengeray a komaen, nga'ayay a tangtangen nga, kaenen. Ano samangta han komaen i, kietecay ko laloma' no tireng, nga'ayay a mipalowan to faedet no tireng, misakahemaw to faloco' ato pa'icel to pinengneng no mata; maecakay a 'anengeray i, dihekoay ko laloma' no tireng, minga'ayay to kietecay ko tireng, panga'ayay to 'ilang, minga'ayay to ŤĄĺ, ato fowa'. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: o~u kako~uro~ut o~u ¶…ô ¶aj a pina…ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u tajwan ko~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj, …ĺaŇč…¨~…ģawaj ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ nira, ¶o~uwa pirawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u fao~u to~u tir…ôŇč nira. misaa…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a pa…ĺo~uma to~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj, ma…ĺo~u ńßasapa…ĺiwa…ĺ i kako~uma…ôn…ôn a …¨~…ģatiŇč. o~u ńß…ô ¶i ńßa…ĺo~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u ato~u papańß ko~u nika…ônan no~u °amis. Ňča °ajaj samanta ńßan ko~u °an…ôŇč…ôraj a ko~uma…ôn, Ňča °ajaj a taŇčtaŇč…ôn Ňča, ka…ôn…ôn. ano~u samaŇčta ńßan ko~uma…ôn i, ki…ôt…ô ¶aj ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u tir…ôŇč, Ňča °ajaj a mipa…ĺo~uwan to~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u tir…ôŇč, misakańß…ômaw to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u mata; ma…ô ¶akaj a °an…ôŇč…ôraj i, …¨~…ģińß…ôko~uaj ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u tir…ôŇč, miŇča °ajaj to~u ki…ôt…ô ¶aj ko~u tir…ôŇč, paŇča °ajaj to~u °i…ĺaŇč, miŇča °ajaj to~u *, ato~u fo~uwa °. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw
